title: VentureQube Specification v1
firstPrinciple: A VentureQube is not a business plan, a pitch deck, or a startup profile. It is a living venture specification whose purpose is to transform ideas into executable ventures.
relationshipToV04: v0.1-v0.4 is the operator-centric portfolio wrapper integrated with the aigentMe experience-model onboarding (idea incubation). v1.0 is the per-venture formation primitive a wrapper venture graduates into (venture blueprinting). The two coexist; v1.0 never replaces v0.4.

relationships.standing: calibrates confidence in venture inputs; does not determine venture success
relationships.metacommons: continuously evaluates against demand, capability, opportunity, and Proof of Work Potential — the intelligence layer for VentureQubes
relationships.proofOfWorkPotential: provides opportunity / capability / venture confidence estimates the VentureQube captures and operationalizes
relationships.proofOfTimeSaved: validates venture / capability / opportunity assumptions — the venture+Polity learning loop

constitutionalPrincipleProposed: The VentureQube exists to transform truthful information, demonstrated capability, and collective intelligence into executable ventures capable of creating meaningful outcomes within the Polity.
canonizationChecklist: VentureQube engine operational (creation, calibration, handoff live)
metaCommons signal evaluation no longer stubbed
spec locked + published to Autodrive + recorded in Amendment Records
note: WORK IN PROGRESS — recorded in Polity Core for legibility while it is built. NOT a ratified charter and NOT part of the Agent Passport binding triple. Will be promoted to a canonized constitutional primitive once the engine is operational and the spec is locked.
